gold_sql: SELECT T2.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL FROM FACT_ACCIDENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DRIVER AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.DAY_OF_WEEK = 'Sunday' AND T2.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL IN (SELECT T2_sub.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL FROM FACT_ACCIDENT AS T1_sub JOIN DIM_DRIVER AS T2_sub ON T1_sub.DRIVER_ID = T2_sub.DRIVER_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3_sub ON T1_sub.TIME_ID = T3_sub.TIME_ID WHERE T3_sub.DAY_OF_WEEK = 'Monday') GROUP BY T2.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL HAVING COUNT(T1.ACCIDENT_ID) >= 1
